current_gate: M1 is not merge-ready. Same-branch correction must address code-review defects plus Owner-observed dock, Inspector access, Boundary, dash-dot and Core-off regressions.

runtime_foundation.merge_policy: Merge only with a corrected and accepted M1 result

locked_inspector_architecture.rule: Exactly one Inspector; never create separate inspectors for appearance, symbols or layers
locked_inspector_architecture.m2_adds: Symbol tab inside the same Inspector
locked_inspector_architecture.important_distinction: User-facing grouping may combine sections, but canonical state, renderer, history and export owners remain separate

active_milestone.title: Production Inspector, Content and Layer Editing Recovery
required_corrections: Escape cancel and one-transaction commit semantics in Table and Inspector
one Inspector with Cell/Membrane/Void Appearance families
Boundary and Core grouped under Cell; Edge grouped under Membrane
working one-click Inspector/info and Detail launchers
all six Boundary styles visibly work in Classic and Organism, including dash-dot
diagnose and remove white centre dots when Core is off
active_milestone.white_dot_finding: Legacy WebGL embedded nucleus dots are forced to zero at the reviewed head. Remaining white centres must be traced through the Canvas2D Core/default/local/preview/debug presentation path.
active_milestone.void_finding: Owner confirms Void currently works; protect it and fix only a reproduced regression.
